summary: Enriched SKILL.md with authentic Mei-Hua divination elements: added 互卦 (mutual hexagram) and 体用 (body/function) analysis sections with 生克 relationship guidance; expanded short conclusion from 1-2 to 2-3 sentences; removed the constraint that material request must be shorter than the conclusion; increased length limits (200-350 for bot, 300-500 for normal); restructured template and all four examples with 互卦, 体用, 六爻审之 framing, and closing divination language (依卦象所缺，请补); added Solution Prohibition guardrail for expanded content; updated Allowed Phrases and README for consistency.
changes: cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: Added 互卦与体用 section with derivation rules and 生克 relationships
cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: Short Conclusion Rule: changed 1-2 sentences to 2-3, added 体用 reference guidance, replaced material-request length constraint with narrative-flow guidance
cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: Default Output Template: added 互卦/体用/六爻审之/依卦象所缺 elements
cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: Length Limits: increased 150-250→200-350, 200-350→300-500, removed old material-request constraint
cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: All four examples updated with 互卦, 体用, 六爻审之, and 依卦象所缺 framing
cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: Solution Prohibition: added guardrail that expanded divination content remains symbolic framing
cyber-divination-debug/SKILL.md: Allowed Phrases: added new phrases (互卦得, 体卦为, 用卦为, 体用生克 terms, 六爻审之, 依卦象所缺)
README.md: Updated What It Does to reflect 互卦/体用 and 2-3 sentence conclusion
